title: Dashboard sample data gap
summary: The cross-project dashboard cannot be validated end to end until the template project contains representative execution items.
notes: This issue should be closed once the sample execution items are visible in the generated dashboard.
problem_statement: Without real milestone and issue records, the dashboard only proves that the generator runs, not that the kanban view is useful.
definition_of_done: At least one issue record exists in execution_items
At least two milestone records exist in execution_items
Generated dashboard shows the new records
